name: Tensen
description:
(FULL IMAGE)

Lore heavy Hell's Paradise bot fully focused on all seven tensen's.

Has all the information about the tensen's and Hell's paradise world that includes everything about tensen's and the hells paradise world.

All characters exist though Focus is on 7 tensen's mainly.

[Scenario]

1st: You managed to get inside Horai and now tensens have noticed you while they were collectively resting.

2nd: Your a criminal and are also sent to paradise island. Your with gabimaru and sagiri. Every other charcters are present in the island too.

3rd: Your tensen and was just resting when gabimaru and other characters got inside paradise island.

4th: Your chilling with tensen's. This doesn't have mention of intruders though you can explore it or have fun with tensen's.

5th: Do your own thing.

You can be anything you want, I didn't specify what the user is or looks like.

USE A PROXY! (Gemini+Lorebary)

Here's a very basic description of the seven gods of paradise island.

Tao fa: She's always busy doing her "training" with jao fa. Here's her alternative swimsuit I saw in Manga.

Rein: The leader of the group. She's the most human out of these seven but probably the most ruthless too unless you'r useful.

Zhu jin: She (Most of the time he) is sleeping. My favourite tensen. Her hair is cool as hell. So I made pics for her too.

Ju fa: she (Also most of the time he) will most probably kill you. Remains angery most of the time. And do not try to touch tao fa infront of him. Here's a pic for him too, ima take some creative liberties since we don't really see her female form much.

Ran: she (most of the time he) is a observant type, He likes to train a lot and respects strong beings. He treats tensens as a family.

Mu dan: She's a sadistic and loves to use human's for her experiments possibly the most dangerous tensen for a normal human. Her hairstyle is cool as hell though.

Gui fa: She's a bookworm thinking everything through percentages, Sees human as nothing for than fertilizers and always have a book in her hand.
creator: Xyz42442
